iterations.theme: The Profound Importance and Impact of Consecration to the Immaculate Heart of Mary
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire transcript represents a single, continuous discourse on Marian consecration, flowing logically from introduction to theological basis, practical implications, and prophetic messages, making a single iteration the most natural and coherent division.
